task_completion.description: Verify that a 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' session is being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Synthetic' or 'Synthetic (algorithmic)' in the session setup screen or indicated in the top-left system status area of the OpenBCI GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the session is configured for 8 channels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '8 Channels' selected in the setup screen, or exactly 8 channels listed in the Time Series widget.

task_completion.description: Verify that the data stream has been started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Stop Data Stream' button (which indicates the stream is currently running) or active, moving waveforms in the Time Series widget.

task_completion.description: Verify that the EMG widget is open and visible in the GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a widget panel explicitly titled 'EMG' within the OpenBCI GUI layout.

task_completion.description: Verify that Channels 1 through 6 are disabled within the EMG widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the channel toggle buttons inside the EMG widget; the buttons or checkboxes for channels 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6 should appear unselected, greyed out, or turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify that Channels 7 and 8 are active and isolated in the EMG widget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the channel toggle buttons inside the EMG widget; channels 7 and 8 should be selected/active. Additionally, there must be exactly 2 signal bars visible in the EMG widget's graph area.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the standard OpenBCI GUI interface with its characteristic dark theme, widgets, and layout, rather than a text editor or mock image.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was achieved via GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using terminal commands to bypass the GUI configuration (e.g., editing JSON config files directly instead of clicking through the interface).

integrity.description: Verify the data appears to be genuinely streaming synthetic data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs (like Time Series or EMG) should display typical algorithmic synthetic waveforms generated by OpenBCI, not static pasted images or empty plots if the stream is supposed to be running.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target widget is 'EMG'. The task requires isolating exactly two channels (7 and 8), which means channels 1 through 6 must be explicitly turned off in the EMG widget. When correctly configured, the EMG widget will display exactly 2 active signal bars corresponding to channels 7 and 8.
